name: GPI Hub Integration
brief: Business Central integration for GPI Document Hub — full Zetadocs replacement
description: Exposes safe, idempotent API endpoints for GPI Hub. Includes document factbox with upload capability on Purchase Invoices, Purchase Orders, Sales Orders, and Posted documents. Supports viewing linked SharePoint documents, uploading new files via GPI Hub API, removing links, and migrating legacy Zetadocs entries.
